verses.text: No Gentail mite hangin Jesuh Khrih thu tawh kisai-in thongkia keimah Paul in Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi
Note' phattuamna dingin Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep a sem dingin a hong sawlna thu na theihsa uh ahi hi
Lai ka hong khaksate sungah a tomno-in kong gensa bangin Pasian in ama thusim kei tungah hong hilh khinzo hi
Tua ka laigelh na sim le uh cin Khrih tawh kisai a thusim ka theihna thu na phawk ding uh hi
A beisa hunah tua thusim pen kuama tungah kigenlo a, ahi zongin Pasian in tu-in a siangtho a sawltakte leh a kamsangte tungah Kha Siangtho a hilhsak hi

Tua thusim pen: Lungdamna thu a kihilhna hangin Gentail mite in Jew mite tawh Pasian' thupha ngahkhawm thei a, amaute tawh pawlkhat suakin, Pasian in piakdingin a ciam thute, Khrih hangin a ngahkhop theihna uh ahi hi
Tua lungdamna thuhilh a sem dingin Pasian in a tuam vilvelin ama vangliatna tawh kei a hong seh hi
Pasian' mi khempeuh lakah kei a neupen hinapi-in, Khrih hangin a kigen zolo thu manpha ahi Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite lakah a gen ding

leh Pasian in a geelsim thute a kisep khiatna thu mi khempeuh a musak dingin Pasian in kei tungah hih hamphatna hong pia hi. Tuhun laitakin vantung a uk van mite in pawlpi' hangin Pasian' pilna a nam tuamtuamin a muhtheihna dingun na khempeuh a bawl Pasian in a beisa hunah hih thu khempeuh a imcip hi
Pasian in a tawntungin a ngimna a omsa bangin i Topa Khrih Jesuh nasepna tawh a ngimna a hong tungsak hi
Amah tawh i kipawlna leh amah i muan'na hangin kimuang takin Pasian kiangah paitheihna ding hun i nei hi
Tua ahih manin note hangin ka thuakna pen note' phattuamna ding ahih manin tua ka thuakna thu hangin lungkiatna-in na nei kei un.
Hih ama geelna teng ka ngaihsut ciangin, vantung a tung khinsa mite leh leitungah a omlai mite khempeuh' pian'na i Pa Pasian' mai-ah ka khukdin' a
note' lungsim a thahatna dingin Pasian in a kicing ama vangliatna sung panin a Kha Siangtho tawh note hong thakhauh sakin
na upna hangun note lungsim sungah Khrih hong tengin, itna thu-ah zung thuk khakin bulkip na neihna dingun thu ka ngen hi
Tua hi leh note in Pasian mi ahi midangte khempeuh tawh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin sau-in zai a, bangzah takin thukin sang ahi hiam, cih na theikhawm ding uh hi
Khrih hong itna a kicing takin theihkhit zawhloh ding ahi ta zongin note in thei-in, Pasian thu a cingin na theihna dingun thu ka hong ngetsak hi
Eite-a' dingin na a hong sepsak, eite' ngetzah val, leh i ngaihsut zawhloh zah dongin a vangliatna tawh tampi tak a hong hihsak thei
eite' Pasian pen, pawlpi mite khempeuh leh Khrih Jesuh tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh in a khang khangin a tawntungin phat ciat ta uh hen. Amen.
